design_philosophy.core_concept: Reliability meets Speed. The UI should feel like a well-maintained power tool: robust, high-contrast, and safe.
visual_enhancers: Subtle Hazard Stripes (in progress bars or active states)
Blueprint grid background for Admin Dashboard

headings.usage: All section headers, machine names, and key metrics. Uppercase for H1/H2.

mono.usage: Asset IDs, License Numbers, Date/Time stamps.

primary.description: Revma High-Voltage Blue. Use for primary actions, header backgrounds, active states.

secondary.description: Safety Orange. Use for 'Rent Now', 'Sign Here', Warnings, and High-Priority CTAs.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider shadow-md transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/90 rounded-sm font-bold uppercase shadow-sm
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary hover:bg-primary/10 rounded-sm font-semibold uppercase

cards.base: bg-white border border-neutral-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow rounded-lg overflow-hidden
cards.machine: group relative border border-neutral-200 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors bg-white rounded-xl shadow-sm overflow-hidden
cards.machine_image_container: aspect-[4/3] bg-neutral-100 relative overflow-hidden group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500

inputs.base: h-12 border-neutral-300 focus:border-primary focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 rounded-md bg-white transition-all
inputs.signature_pad: border-2 border-dashed border-neutral-300 rounded-lg bg-neutral-50 hover:bg-white transition-colors h-48 w-full flex items-center justify-center cursor-crosshair

grids.machines: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-8

signature.instruction: Must allow clear, save, and resize. Background should be faint grid or white.

pdf_generation.instruction: Generate standard Australian hire agreement layout. Include logo, timestamp, and signature images.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Barlow Condensed' from Google Fonts for all headings.
Use 'Public Sans' from Google Fonts for all body text.
Ensure all forms are mobile-responsive with h-12 inputs for easy tapping.
The Dashboard must separate 'Active Hires' from 'Fleet Management'.
Pre-start checklist must block the 'Sign' button until all items are checked.
Use the provided image URLs for the machine cards.
Implement a 'Tactical' visual style: sharp corners on buttons, high contrast, industrial blue/orange palette.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) only for overlays/modals in this industrial context.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all.
You MUST NOT center align the app container.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors: separates good from extraordinary.
Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
